Terms and Conditions

No Cost EMI and Low Cost EMI option will be made available to customers who purchase eligible Google products ("Products") using select credit cards from participating banks/financial institutions ("Issuing Banks") and opt for the No Cost EMI or Low Cost EMI payment option.The eligibility of Products for No Cost EMI or Low Cost EMI is at the sole discretion of Google and may be subject to change without prior notice. 'No Cost EMI' implies that the interest component charged by the Issuing Bank will be provided as an upfront discount at the time of purchase, effectively reducing the price of the eligible Product to the total amount payable in EMIs. The discount provided under the No Cost EMI is solely for the purpose of adjusting the interest component charged by the Issuing Bank. 'Low Cost EMI' implies that a portion (not the complete interest component) of the interest component charged by the Issuing Bank will be provided as an upfront discount at the time of purchase, effectively reducing the price of the eligible Product to the total amount payable in EMIs. The discount provided under the Low Cost EMI is solely for the purpose of adjusting only a portion of interest component charged by the Issuing Bank. Google displays representative No Cost EMI/Low-Cost EMI–related information (EMI amount, interest rate charged and total amount payable) for customer’s purchase as per the information shared with Google by the customer’s Issuing Bank on an “AS IS“ basis. Customers’ Issuing Bank is the authoritative source of this information and customers are advised to contact their Issuing Bank for clarifications in this regard. Google is not responsible for any processing fees, pre-closure charges, or other charges levied by the Issuing Bank. Customers are advised to review the Issuing Bank's terms and conditions related to EMI transactions.Google shall have no liability in the event their Issuing Bank refuses to process No Cost EMI/Low-Cost EMI payment option transaction.

Terms and Conditions

Exchange bonus is available only for select/eligible devices. Offer subject to successful trade-in completion with trade-in partner ("Cashify"). Cashify will reimburse the exchange bonus amount upon successful completion of trade-in and device pick up. Cashify terms also apply. If the purchased Google product (for which the exchange bonus was issued) is returned, the exchange bonus will no longer be eligible and will be deducted from the refund.

Terms and Conditions

Save ₹5,000 on Pixel 10. Offer valid starting on 7 April 2026 at 10:25 am IST and ends on 31 December 2026 at 11:59 pm IST. Offer available only to residents of India aged 18 years or older with shipping addresses in India. Offer cannot be combined with any promotional codes, or with other offers running at the same time. It is non-transferable, and it is not valid for cash or a cash equivalent. Purchase must be made on Google Store India. Available only while supplies last. Limit to 2 per customer. Void where prohibited

Terms and Conditions

To qualify for instant cashback on the Pixel 10, a minimum transaction of ₹48,749 is required.

Instant Cashback will be made available to the customers who purchase eligible Google products ("Products") using an eligible credit card of participating banks ("Issuing Banks") with EMI as a payment option.

Instant Cashback means an immediate reduction in the purchase price of the Product at the time of transaction, when a qualifying card from an Issuing Bank is used. The discount amount or percentage will be as specified on the Product page and/or at checkout. The discount may vary depending on the Product and the Issuing Bank.

Instant Cashback may, or may not be combined with other offers, at the sole discretion of Google. Any allowed combinations will be clearly specified within the offer details. The discount will be applied only upon successful authorization of the transaction by the Issuing Bank. The Issuing Bank reserves the right to modify or withdraw the Instant Cashback at any time.

Google does not charge customers any processing or convenience fee for the purpose of facilitating Instant Cashback. The customer's Issuing Bank may charge processing fees. Customer's relationship with the Issuing Bank is governed by the Issuing Bank's agreement. Google is not responsible for any disputes between the customer and the Issuing Bank.

New on Pixel 10.

Capture stunning details from super far away with the new 5x telephoto lens.

Get the info you need before you even have to ask with Pixel’s new Magic Cue.

All-new Camera Coach uses Gemini models to help you snap your best pics.

You can now talk with Gemini about anything you see using Gemini Live and your camera.

The power of Gemini, supercharged on Pixel.

Pixel phones have Gemini built in to help you do more, faster, and easier. Enabled by our next-gen chip, Google Tensor G5, it’s the extraordinary AI assistant for all things you.

Talk to Gemini about anything you see.

Share your camera in Gemini Live to have a back-and-forth chat about what’s around you.
Read more

Ask Gemini about anything, from anywhere.

Go Live with Gemini to have a natural, free-flowing conversation. Just start talking to get info, brainstorm ideas, and more.

Ask Gemini to do multiple tasks across your apps.

Save time by asking Gemini to find info and get things done for you across your apps—like finding an appointment on your calendar and showing the location on Google Maps.

Ask Gemini to do multiple tasks across your apps.

Save time by asking Gemini to find info and get things done for you across your apps—like finding an appointment on your calendar and showing the location on Google Maps.

More ways to work wonders with Google AI.

The right info, right when you need it.

Introducing Magic Cue, a suite of new AI-powered capabilities for Pixel that proactively suggests helpful information, right as you need it. A friend texts asking the location for dinner? Magic Cue can surface the answer ready to share with a tap.

Searching has come full circle.

Just use your finger to draw a circle around what you want more info about—like an image, text, or video. Pixel finds it fast, right from the app you’re in.
Explore Circle to Search

A camera that puts a whole new lens on stunning images.

The Pixel 10 camera has a new 5x telephoto lens with up to 20x Super Res Zoom for creating sharp, detailed photos at a distance.

True to life photos and videos. Out of this world editing.

Night Sight

Night Sight

Brilliant photos, dusk to dawn.

Night Sight takes sharp, vivid photos, portraits, and panos in low light settings like concerts and cityscapes—even the Milky Way with astrophotography.

Take sharp, crisp, share-worthy selfies with the 10.5 MP camera and autofocus. And when you want to fit more in, the 95° field of view makes it a snap.

See the bigger picture.

Pixel 10’s ultrawide camera lets you fit more into a single frame. Perfect for capturing vast landscapes, expansive scenery, and more of an interior space.

Clear, vibrant photos in any light.

Transform photos in the blink of AI.

Snap your best pics with coaching from your camera.

Pixel’s new Camera Coach uses Gemini to help you read the scene, find the best angle and lighting, and even suggest the ideal settings and modes.

Photo editing is easier than ever.

Making studio-quality edits is effortless with Google Photos. Adjust the focus, change the background, move objects, and more with just a few taps.
Explore Editing in Google Photos

Amazing group pics with a click.

It’s a snap to take shareable group pics. After you take the photo, Pixel can automatically find and combine similar photos to create the best one.

Take the picture. And be in it, too.

With Add Me, it’s even easier to make sure that no one’s left out of the photo. Now you can add the photographer to bigger groups and get more creative with the composition.
Explore Add Me

Get that new-phone feeling every few months.

New and improved features just show up. Kinda like magic.

With Pixel Drops, your phone keeps getting better over time, automatically bringing you things like new Gemini features, camera updates, and more.
Explore Pixel Drops

Designed for durability. Made for real life.

Tough enough to hold up when spills and tumbles go down.,

The 11% brighter Actua display is easy on the eyes, even in direct sunlight.

Pixel 10’s polished back glass and satin finish give it a vibrant look and silky feel. The metal accents are made from 100% recycled aluminium—so it’s both beautiful and responsible.

“Pixel 10 features a striking array of bold and vibrant colours that radiate pure energy.”

Designer, Google Colour, Material & Finish

A battery that lasts. And charges fast.

Over 24 hours of battery life.

The Pixel 10 battery can last over 24 hours, and up to 100 hours with Extreme Battery Saver.

Charge wirelessly in a snap.

Pixel 10 phones now have Pixelsnap, magnetic technology that lets you effortlessly snap on Qi2 wireless chargers for fast, efficient charging.
Browse Pixelsnap chargers

On a serious power chip.

Pixel’s fastest, most powerful chip yet.

The all-new Tensor G5 chip is Pixel’s biggest performance leap yet. It’s custom built for Google’s advanced AI, an all-day battery life, and high-quality photos and videos.
Explore Google Tensor

Powerful protection from whatever, wherever.

Security and OS updates for seven years.

Pixel has extra layers of protection to keep your info safe. And it gets regular updates for 7 years to help keep your phone secure over time.

Emergency help, always on hand.

With safety features like Emergency SOS, Pixel can call emergency services and share your location if you cannot.

Automatically locks if it’s lost or stolen.

If a theft is detected, Theft Detection automatically locks your phone to give you peace of mind that your sensitive information stays private.

Frequently asked questions.

What is an unlocked Pixel 10?

An unlocked Pixel 10 is a phone that isn’t tied to a specific operator. When you purchase an unlocked Pixel 10, you get to choose which operator or plan works best for you.

Important: Pixel phones work with all major operators. But not all Pixel 4a (5G) and later phones have 5G functionality on all 5G networks.* See a list of certified operators to make sure your phone works on its 5G network.

To use a SIM-unlocked phone:
1. Buy an unlocked Pixel phone from the Google Store.
2. Contact a mobile operator.
3. Follow their instructions to set up your phone with their service plan.

*For 5G, some operators may require a 5G plan (sold separately). Contact operator for details. See g.co/pixel/networkinfo for info.

Does Pixel 10 have 5G network compatibility?

Yes, Pixel 10 works with 5G networks. The type of 5G service depends on both the phone model and the carrier network. Learn more about 5G.

What is included in the Pixel 10 box?

Your Pixel 10 purchase comes with a 1 m USB-C® to USB-C® cable (USB® 2.0). Pixel 10 does not come with a 45W USB-C Power Charger, but that can be purchased separately.

How does the Google Store exchange programme work?

Our exchange programme with Cashify makes it easy to get the latest Google Pixel phones. You can exchange Google Pixel phones and phones from most other manufacturers. How much you will get for your exchange depends on the model, manufacturer, and condition of your phone. If your old device is eligible, you’ll receive a refund via Netbanking or UPI once Cashify inspects your old device.

When you order a new Pixel, you’ll get an estimate for your old device. After your new Pixel device arrives, you will be notified to set up an exchange appointment with Cashify. A Cashify representative will then collect your old device and send payment after inspection during the appointment (the amount may be adjusted). Learn more about the Google Store exchange programme.

How do I switch from an Android phone or an iPhone to Pixel 10?

Switching to Pixel is easy. You can transfer your stuff, like photos and messages, from your old phone to your Pixel in a few easy steps. Learn more about switching to Pixel.

Where can I find setup instructions and tips for my new Pixel 10?

Move your stuff over, personalise your settings and explore Pixel features to get the most out of your phone. Get more help 24/7 at g.co/pixel/support.

Who should I contact if I have questions about my Pixel 10 purchase?

Visit our Help Centre to contact us and get help.

Where can I find the manufacturer, importer, and country of origin details?

Information with respect to the product including manufacturer, importer, country of origin, and other related information can be found on the Product Legal Declarations page.
